svg.title: Phase 4 secure IPC architecture overview
svg.desc: Structural diagram showing the ULTIMA 2.0 runtime with Phase 4 security extensions: MCB, scheduler, secure IPC messenger with ACL gate and encryption engine, task layer with secure mailbox, event log, and BETTI sidecar.

g.text: Security | Privacy | Encryption — visible from step 1/17 through step 17/17
